title: Thepaperbagstore 10 Purple Large Paper Bags With Handles - 32x12x41cm - Colourful Paper Gift Bags for Adults and Kids - for Shopping, Party, Retail, Birthdays and Weddings
features: STRONG WELL-MADE BAGS - The size of the twisted handle paper bags is 32 x 12 x 11cm, 12.5 x 4.75 x 16 inches. Made of 110GSM Kraft paper, tough and scratch resistance. This makes our paper gift bags have a strong and reliable load-bearing capacity for all uses.

WIDE RANGE OF COLOUR CHOICES – Available in 14 Fantastic bright colours, these bags offer a vibrant and eye-catching selection for all your packaging needs. Whether you need them for a kid’s party, a special birthday, wedding, baby shower, corporate giveaway or retail you can find a colour that matches your theme or brand identity.

STURDY TWIST PAPER HANDLES – Twist handle carrier bags provide a convenient and comfortable way to carry them. They offer a firm grip and ergonomic design which enhances the overall usability and practicality of these bags. Our bags size does not include the size of the handles.

PERFECT FOR CRAFT – All our bags are single colour with no patterns, no frills. Our Gift Bags are the perfect canvas for your DIY creation. Transfer your imagination and creativity on it to make every bag one-of-a-kind for the perfect Gift. Suitable to contain little toys, notes, dolls, biscuits, sweets and other present ideas.

ECO-FRIENDLY PAPER GIFT BAGS – Thepaperbagstore paper bags are made of premium recyclable paper. They are environment-friendly, durable, and reusable. Eco-friendly and great for giving gifts or retail use. Great for packing gifts, groceries, merchandise, or takeout meals. Our paper bags are recyclable, compostable, and a great alternative to plastic bags.
description: Product Description Thepaperbagstore is a major UK supplier of own brand, designed and manufactured re-usable/recyclable paper bags and paper products. PURPLE TWIST HANDLE PAPER CARRIER BAGS Bag size 320x120x405mm / 12.5"x4.75"x16" (W x D x H) Fantastic Quality Purple Twist Handle Paper Carrier Bags. Made from strong White 100gsm Kraft paper Suitable for uses including – Fashion Items, Gift Bags, Presents, Groceries and so much more…. VARIOUS COLOURS AVAILABLE Also ideal for sweets and biscuits for charity fund raising events Fantastic Quality Twist Handle Paper Carrier Bags. Size: 320x120x405mm / 12.5"x4.75"x16" (W x D x H) High Quality Paper Bags With Handles made from thick 100 GSM Coloured White Kraft Paper HIGH QUALITY PAPER CARRIER BAGS WITH HANDLES 16 Fantastic Bright Colours Available
